h1.visual_description: Large, sans-serif font, left-aligned, significant top margin, black color.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample, but expected to be smaller than H1, sans-serif, bold or semi-bold.

visual_matchers.pattern: Image with text wrapped to the right side in a narrow column.
Bullet points using small centered dots (middle dots) rather than standard round bullets.
Numbered text at the bottom of the page, separated from main body by whitespace.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (not present in sample, but standard for technical docs)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Superscript numbers in-text corresponding to full bibliographic entries at the bottom of the page.

layout_info.primary_flow: single-column with occasional side-aligned figure captions
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and chapter title at the very bottom (e.g., '4 | The Data Journey')
